// Repo-health checks: These scripts used to run in pre-commit and were briefly run silently via emeraldwalk.runonsave. Defined as tasks with problem matchers so failures surface as squiggles + Problems-panel entries instead of disappearing into an output channel. Triggered on save by gruntfuggly.triggertaskonsave (see settings.json).
// Diagnostic format contract: Each script emits `path:line:startCol-endCol: message` per failure (see check_modules.py / check_go_work.py for anchor choice and column derivation). The matcher pattern parses that into VS Code diagnostics; columns are 1-based with endCol exclusive, so a value-bearing diagnostic squiggles the offending token while anchor-only diagnostics emit 1-2 for a one-char fallback. The matcher's `owner` namespaces the diagnostics so a re-run with no findings clears the previous run's squiggles.
// Bazel build/test: Marked as default for their respective groups so Cmd+Shift+B / Run Test Task pick them up. Surfaced in the Task Manager sidebar via taskManager.favorites (settings.json).
